name: Chicken, Corn, and Zucchini Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless chicken breasts (skin removed, cut into large chunks)
1/2 cup apple cider vinegar or 1/2 cup natural apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat the oil over medium heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Add the bacon and cook until lightly crisped, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the zucchini and mushrooms, cover, and cook until the vegetables begin to soften, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the chicken and flour; cook uncovered, stirring frequently, until the chicken is lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the apple cider vinegar or apple juice and salt. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, reduce to a simmer, cover, and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 4 minutes.
6. Stir in the corn; cook uncovered until the corn is just heated through, about 2 more minutes.
7. Spoon the chicken and vegetables onto four plates and sprinkle with parsley. Serve.
Total cooking time: 20 minutes.
